user.title: FauxMo
user.description: Set up FauxMo. Alexa will discover each exposed entity as a Belkin WeMo switch on your network.

data_description.base_port: Starting TCP port for WeMo device servers. Each entity gets its own port offset from this value. Default is 50000.

import.title: Migrate from Emulated Hue
import.description: An existing Emulated Hue configuration with {entity_count} entities was found. Import them into FauxMo?

init.title: FauxMo Options
init.description: Select entities to expose as WeMo switches (max 255) and set their Alexa-visible names.

entity_names.title: Entity Names
entity_names.description: Set the name Alexa will use for each entity. Leave blank to use the entity's friendly name.
